query_normalized: unveiling hidden correlations between processing parameters and mechanical properties in additively manufactured alloys materials science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (b) by investigating the same core mechanism (the correlation between processing parameters like print trajectory and mechanical properties) and measuring the same dependent variables (failure strength and stiffness), even though it focuses on polymers rather than alloys.
